opis: A compact and discreet loudspeaker that won’t draw attention to itself - at least, not until it starts performing. If you want a small, easy-to-position speaker that sounds way bigger than it looks, this bookshelf model fits the bill (and your space) perfectly.

If you want scale in your sound but not in the size of your loudspeaker cabinet, you want the new 3020c standmount. It’s ready and able to let you experience all the power and dynamism of your favourite music, but without dominating your living space.

The Q 3020i is a bookshelf or stand mount speaker from Q Acoustics core loudspeaker offering, designed to deliver beautiful sound into your home, using the latest technological enhancements applied to the full 3000i series.

Q Acoustics 3030i bookshelf speaker is the latest addition to the Award-winning 3000i speaker range. Designed to deliver the biggest, most commanding sound ever achieved by a speaker of this type and price.

Small enough to keep a low profile, but with sound big and accomplished enough to draw attention to itself. If you want off-the-scale performance from a discreet, compact and easy-to-position loudspeaker, the 5010 bookshelf speaker fits the bill as nicely as it fits your space.

opis: Experience all the scale and power of your favourite music without letting your loudspeaker dominate your room. The 5020 standmounting speaker will put your right in the heart of the music without putting itself at the heart of your space.
Taking acoustic technology and design cues from the flagship Concept 300, while also introducing new audio innovations, the Concept 30 standmount delivers truly high-end home audio performance.

This flagship standmount makes a cutting-edge design statement, while harbouring state-of-the-art acoustic innovations from its bigger brother, the Concept 500. Fused with ground-breaking speaker stand technology, the Concept 300 is Q Acoustics’ most progressive speaker yet.

opis: The Q 3050i speakers boast a range of unique technologies including HPE™ and P2P™ to ensure these floorstanding speakers deliver a truly exceptional sound.

5040 is a notably compact floorstander with a modest footprint - which means it’s ideal for those environments where space is at a premium but the desire for full-scale audio excitement (as well a visual gratification) is strong.

opis: Where sheer scale, widescreen sound-staging and complete audio-fidelity are concerned, the 5050 outperforms its nominal competition with ease. If you have a bigger space to fill with the most beautifully and accurately reproduced sound, the 5050 floorstander is the speaker you need. Supplied with magnetically fixed grilles.

A sonic step-up from the Concept 30, this elegant floorstander takes everything great about its standmount brother but delivers more powerful audio, a deeper soundstage and increased bass extension through its leading-edge, low resonance cabinet.

The top-of-the-range Concept speaker, this high-end floorstander is designed to appeal to discerning audiophiles. The Concept 500 achieves a perfect balance between art and science. It is a loudspeaker that is at once, stylish, contemporary, exquisite-sounding and astonishingly accurate,

opis: Utilizing the technology that the rest of the 3000i series boasts, the Q 3060S slimline subwoofer is as powerful as it is attractive.

Smaller rooms with smaller speakers still deserve big, well-controlled bass for listening to music or watching movies. The Q SUB80 with its 8in driver is the ideal partner for M20 or M40 active speakers or 3000c and 5000 Cinema Packs in ones or twos.

opis: This powerful, 140watts rms, twin 170mm drive unit subwoofer will bring the full explosive majesty of blockbuster movie soundtracks into your living room.

The Q 3090Ci Centre Speaker delivers an immersive home cinema experience with precision twin 100mm (4") and 22mm (0.9") drivers, ensuring exceptional detail in every word and sound. Designed with technology from the broader 3000i range, it incorporates P2P bracing and new high-frequency drivers to ensure acoustic consistency across your setup.

Thanks to a decoupled tweeter design, the speaker reduces vibration interference for clearer, more refined sound. The mid/bass driver is constructed from coated paper and rubber surrounds for controlled resonance. The 3090Ci is crafted for easy positioning, matching the width of most AV receivers, and includes new low-profile binding posts for sleek cable integration.

It’s available in four modern finishes—Carbon Black, Arctic White, Graphite Grey, and English Walnut—each with chrome bezels and magnetic grilles, making it as attractive as it is powerful.

Designed to project dialogue ahead of even the most full-on Hollywood action movie soundtrack, and to deliver all the subtlety and nuance of art-house favourites with equal ease and conviction. Put the 5090 at the centre of your home cinema system and get the complete picture.

At the heart of a Concept 5.1 home cinema set-up, the Concept 90 is our most high-performance centre channel speaker yet. Able to deliver astonishingly dynamic and ultra-clear dialogue, this speaker is the star of the Concept home cinema range.
Q Acoustics Concept 300 Speakers’ Tensegrity Stands redefine the relationship between the speaker and the stand by using a completely new design

The WB50 is a unique ‘Tilt and Turn’ loudspeaker bracket, which is adjusted via a single Allen bolt. This bracket allows for the 3010i, 3020i, 3010c, 3020c, 3090c along with the 5010 and M20 models to be mounted almost flat to the wall or angled down or sideways.

Engineered to elevate your 3030i and 3030c speakers, the 3030FSi Floor Stands feature a robust triple-upright architecture with acoustically damped columns that minimize vibration and enhance sonic clarity.

The precision-engineered design ensures optimal speaker positioning while maintaining structural integrity. Available in textured satin black or white finishes, these stands integrate seamlessly into any listening environment while providing the stable, vibration-free platform your speakers demand for accurate audio reproduction.
A sturdy wall bracket boasting a 'tilt and turn' mechanism, a Concept 30 or 90 speaker can be mounted almost flat to the wall or angled down or sideways. Available in black or white finishes

The most convenient and cost-effective way to fill your home with full-size, powerful and immersive sound without filling your home with big, imposing loudspeakers. These quality micro-towers have the flexibility to support numerous wired and wireless sources of music.

opis: Sometimes you want your music to hit hard and dig deep - but that doesn’t mean you need a great big loudspeaker with a great big driver. No, it means you need the 3030c - the standmount with the greatest bass extension and low-end drive in the range.
